relationships: kab:Amek i tesɛeddayeḍ taggara n dduṛt-ik ar tura﹖
kab:Tḥemmleḍ ad turareḍ ddabex n uḍar﹖
kab:Ad tennejmaɛ tejmaɛt ass n letnayen i d-iteddun
kab:Mary ed tom ttxemmimen ɣef uqader n tmeddurt tusligt
kab:Ha-ten-an tturaren ddabex n uḍar deg walbaɛḍ imeḍqan
kab:Tḥemmleḍ ad turareḍ ddabex n uqecwal﹖
kab:Akka tura ulac-it Tom deg wexxam n Mari
kab:Yessuter-iyi-d Tom ad ffɣeɣ yid-s tagara n dduṛt
kab:Ad nemlil deg texxamt n tarda yeḥman
kab:Anda ara truḥemt ass n lḥedd i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Ad d-tasem ɣer Montreal taggara n dduṛt-a﹖
kab:Anda ara truḥeḍ ass n lḥedd i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Anda ara truḥemt ass n letnayen i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Anda ara truḥeḍ ass n letnayen i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Anda ara truḥem ass n letnayen i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Anda ara truḥem ass n lḥedd i d-iteddun﹖
kab:Tetturareḍ ddabex n uḍar yal ass﹖
kab:Tessneḍ ziɣ ad turareḍ ticirett n uḍar
kab:Turareḍ ddabex n ufus imalas yezrin﹖
kab:Tom ur yettili ara kul ass deg uxxam deg wass n letnayen
kab:Tom yezmer deg uxxam ara yili ass n letnayen
kab:Yetturar ddabex n uḍar akked mmi-s
kab:Yessefk γef Sami ad yeḥbes turart n uraren
kab:Tutlayt, tikwal, ur tezmir ara ad d-tini iḥulfan n umdan
kab:Ad nnejmaɛen iɛeggalen n tejmaɛt ass n letnayen i d-iteddun
kab:Amek i tesɛeddayem taggara n dduṛt-nwen ar tura﹖
kab:Tom ed mary la tturaren yiwen n wurar
kab:Amek i tesɛeddayemt taggara n dduṛt-nkent ar tura﹖
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tella tesfillit i wayen n diri
kab:Yetturar akken iwata ddabex n ufus
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad xedmeɣ aya ɣef teɣzi n yiḍ﹖
kab:Ur tessin ara ad tɣeṛ yaya-s n Tom imir-n
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad mmeslayeɣ s yisem n tom
kab:Ur lliɣ ara da i wakken ad m-xedmeɣ ayen n diri
kab:Yetturar ddabex n uḍar d yimeddukal-is
kab:Ur lliɣ ara da i wakken ad k-xedmeɣ ayen n diri
kab:Ur lliɣ ara da i wakken ad awen-xedmeɣ ayen n diri
kab:Bɣiɣ ad yili kra n yiwen i wumi ara meslayeɣ
kab:Akken llan, ur ssinen ara ad sneṭqen isem n Tom
kab:Ilaq ad tedduḍ yid-i kra n wass
kab:Tuget n yemdanen ur tessen ara ayen i asen-ilaqen n waman
kab:Ur lliɣ ara da i wakken ad kent-xedmeɣ ayen n diri
kab:Yal ass tturareɣ ddabex n uḍar
kab:Marie tella d tamburt s teɣzef n tmeddurt-nnes
kab:S kra n win i t-yessnen akken ilaq yettqadar-it
kab:Acuɣer ur nettraǧu ara armi d ass n letnayen﹖
kab:Marie tella tesɛa kraḍ n yimdanen yid-s
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
kab:Mary tekkes-d akk ayen yellan deg tculliḍt-is n yiḍes
kab:Yiwen n usurif amecṭuḥ yezmer ad ibeddel kra yellan
kab:Ula d tullas zemrent ad urarent ddabex n uḍar
kab:Ufiɣ iman-iw di turart n wass-agi
kab:Yella wass ideg turareḍ akked Tom urar n mmet-a-ccix﹖
kab:Tom ur yessin ula d yiwen seg yimeddukal n Mary
kab:Ur xdimeɣ ara akken ilaq deg ukayad n wassa
kab:Aṭas n wayen ara iẓer yiwen i yellan deg Paris
kab:Llan yigurdan tturaren paypay deg tsenbert n uɣerbaz
kab:Turagt-iw n tenhert ad temmet imalas i d-iteddun
kab:Mary tenna-iyi-d dakken ur tḥemmel ara agmar n yiselman
kab:Igerdan llan tturaren paypay deg umraḥ n uɣerbaz
kab:Ur tezmiremt ara ad temmeslayemt taglizit s 100 n wawalen
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma iɛawen-iyi kra n yiwen
kab:Yal yiwen yessaram d akken kra n dir ur d-iḍerru
kab:Ad ak-waliɣ deg wass n warim i d-iteddun di Ustriya
kab:Mary teẓra dakken ccbaḥa tbeddu-d s leqder n yiman-is
kab:Tom imir-nni kan i yeẓra d akken amjebbad yella-d seg sin n yidisan
kab:Ur yeẓri ara Tom belli nekk mačči n Kanada
kab:Dacu ara txedmemt taggara n imalas-a﹖
kab:Melmi kan i d-telmed mary timussniwin timaynutin n tmeddurt ﹖
kab:Tom d Mary mmeslayen ɣef tegnewt n wass-a
kab:Dacu ara txedmeḍ taggara n imalas-a﹖
kab:Llant kra n tɣawsiwin ur zmiren ara ad tent-id-sɣen yidrimen
kab:Akka tura, liḥala n tdamsa ur tgerrez ara
kab:Dadda yetteddu ad yegmer iselman yal tagara n dduṛt
kab:Dacu ara txedmem taggara n imalas-a﹖
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad t-xedmeɣ mebla ma tɛawen-iyi kra n yiwet
kab:Tesɛiḍ tarmit akked talɣiwin n tẓuri yemgaraden ﹖
kab:Ismideg n Isṛayil akken ma yella d uday
kab:Ad nesɛu akayad n tefṛansist letnayen i d-iteddun
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad temmeslayem taglizit s 100 n wawalen
